brand_identity.name: Mira
brand_identity.emotional_tone: A mystical connection between pet and parent. Tech that feels like magic, not code.

mira_orb_redesign.rationale: Replaces the 'Cyber' look with a 'Jewel' look. Uses the brand's Soul Gradient (Purple-Pink-Amber) to ensure harmony on both dark and light backgrounds.

specs.inner_light: conic-gradient(from 0deg, transparent 0%, rgba(245,158,11,0.5) 15%, transparent 30%, rgba(236,72,153,0.5) 50%, transparent 65%, rgba(147,51,234,0.5) 80%, transparent 100%)

contrast_strategy.on_dark: The lighter purple top-left highlight (#581c87) ensures visibility against dark navy backgrounds.
contrast_strategy.on_light: The deep obsidian bottom-right shadow (#020617) ensures weight and presence against white backgrounds.

component_rules.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-stone-100 hover:shadow-md transition-all
component_rules.inputs: bg-stone-50 border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-purple-200 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-purple-500/10 rounded-xl

layout_strategies.bento_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4. Mix aspect ratios (1:1, 2:1, 2:2).
layout_strategies.spacing: Use 'space-premium' (2rem+) between sections. Don't crowd the soul.

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Micro-interactions: Every click needs a scale effect. Every hover needs a lift.
Texture: Use subtle noise or grain on dark backgrounds to prevent banding.
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast is > 4.5:1. Use 'data-testid' on all interactables.
Motion: Use 'framer-motion' for smooth, physics-based animations. No linear easings.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the new MiraOrb.jsx using the specs above. Ensure it replaces the old 'Cyber' version globally. Update any hardcoded colors in pages to use the CSS variables defined in index.css.
